ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] Choose a character from the play and determine where he/she would fit on your Way of the Will chart. Share your reasoning with someone.
[ ] Perform the play. Or act out an abridged version such as[ The 30 Minute Shakespeare](https://www.30minuteshakespeare.com/products/a-midsummer-nights-dream-the-30-minute-shakespeare-5?_pos=1&_sid=ca19d7af8&_ss=r).
[ ] Movie Recommendations: The Tempest (2010) PG-13

[ ] Choose a character from the play and determine where he/she would fit on your Way of the Will chart. Share your reasoning with someone.
[ ] Perform the play or act out an abridged version such as [The 30 Minute Shakespeare](https://www.30minuteshakespeare.com/products/a-midsummer-nights-dream-the-30-minute-shakespeare-5?_pos=1&_sid=ca19d7af8&_ss=r).
[ ] Movie Recommendations: The Hollow Crown Season 1, Episode 3. Rated TV-14 (please consult a parental guide before watching, consider skipping graphic scenes).

[ ] Choose a character from the play and determine where he/she would fit on your Way of the Will chart. Share your reasoning with someone.
[ ] Perform the play or act out an abridged version such as [The 30 Minute Shakespeare](https://www.30minuteshakespeare.com/products/a-midsummer-nights-dream-the-30-minute-shakespeare-5?_pos=1&_sid=ca19d7af8&_ss=r).
[ ] Take a [virtual tour](https://www.shakespearesglobe.com/whats-on/globe-theatre-guided-tour/) of Shakespeare's Globe Theatre.
[ ] Movie Recommendations: The Winter's Tale BBC (1981), Branagh's The Winter's Tale (2015)

resources.title: Beautiful Stories from Shakespeare
resources.author: Edith Nesbit
resources.rationale: Retellings of plays that can be used as a teacher resource or read to students who are new to Shakespeare.

resources.title: Echoes of Eden: Reflections on Christianity, Literature, and the Arts
resources.author: Jerram Barrs
resources.rationale: We highly recommend chapter 9 which is about the importance of Shakespeare, especially for Christians.

resources.title: Great Stage of Fools: A Guide to Six Shakespeare Plays
resources.author: Peter Leithart
resources.rationale: Teacher resource that provides analysis and background information for the three plays scheduled this year.

resources.title: Shakespeare After All
resources.author: Marjorie Garber
resources.rationale: Teacher resource that goes into more depth about 38 of Shakespeare's plays.

resources.title: Stories from Shakespeare
resources.author: Marchette Chute
resources.rationale: A highly recommended "retelling" book that offers the plot, some quotes, and a bit of explanation. A perfect teacher resource to read before starting the play.

resources.title: Tales from Shakespeare
resources.author: Charles and Mary Lamb
resources.rationale: An introduction to the study of Shakespeare.
